titleEn: Coles and Ever.Ag partner on smarter meat supply chain
titleZh: Coles与Ever.Ag合作打造更智能的肉类供应链
summaryZh: 澳大利亚超市巨头Coles与农业食品科技公司Ever.Ag合作，将先进数据科学与优化建模引入鲜肉供应链。通过Ever.Ag的S&OP平台，Coles实现了从数小时手动规划到几分钟自动建模的转变，覆盖牛肉、羊肉和猪肉品类，提升了规划准确性、运营效率和客户响应能力。未来计划从基于数量的优化转向基于价值的优化，纳入盈利能力和环境影响等因素。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了数据科学和自动化规划在大型零售肉类供应链中的实际应用，为智慧畜牧行业提供了从农场到餐桌的数字化协同案例，尤其对关注供应链优化和智能决策的从业者具有重要参考价值。
contentFull: Market NewsPork Market NewsNewsColes and Ever.Ag partner on smarter meat supply chainCollaboration introduces advanced data science to optimize planning across fresh beef, pork and lamb categories.Industry ReleaseJune 24, 2026schedule1 Min ReadEver.AgColes Supermarkets has partnered with Ever.Ag, a global agrifood technology leader, to introduce advanced data science and optimization modeling into Coles' highly complex fresh meat supply chain. This collaboration marks a major step toward faster, smarter operations across beef, lamb and pork categories.Historically, planning for meat supply required hours of manual coordination, spreadsheets and deep institutional knowledge. Now, using Ever.Ag's S&OP platform, Coles automatically ingests and models data from across its operations, producing optimized production and deployment plans complete with predictive insights and built-in compliance rules.Since implementation, Coles has:Cut planning time from hours to minutes through automated data modeling.Applied business policies consistently across beef, lamb and pork.Reduced operational risk by embedding institutional knowledge into the system.Improved customer responsiveness to meet changing demand.Improved planning accuracy to better support the management of freshness and pricing across meat categories.Strengthened planning capabilities to support more efficient production and inventory management.Related:WEBINAR KEY TAKEAWAY: Beyond Feed Formulation to Maximize Profit/Pig"Meat is one of the most complex supply chains in food retail," said Scott Sexton, chief executive officer of Ever.Ag. "By applying data science at scale, Coles is showing what's possible when advanced analytics meet real-world operations.""Our priority is delivering the best experience for our customers," said Martin Smithson, Coles executive general manager supermarket operations. "This approach helps ensure the freshest cuts are available at the right price."Looking ahead, Coles and Ever.Ag plan to move from volume-based to value-based optimization, incorporating factors such as profitability, operational efficiency and customer outcomes into the same planning models. This next phase will enable Coles to simulate scenarios, anticipate market swings and make decisions that balance efficiency with environmental impact.Ever.Ag provides innovative AgTech solutions and services, with market intelligence, risk management and cutting-edge software that enable smarter, more sustainable operations across dairy, livestock, crops and agribusiness sectors.About the translationZh:
Coles超市已与全球农业食品技术领导者Ever.Ag合作，将先进的数据科学和优化建模引入Coles高度复杂的鲜肉供应链。此次合作标志着在牛肉、羊肉和猪肉品类中迈向更快、更智能运营的重要一步。

历史上，肉类供应规划需要数小时的手动协调、电子表格和深厚的机构知识。现在，利用Ever.Ag的S&OP平台，Coles自动摄取并建模来自其各个运营环节的数据，生成优化的生产和部署计划，并附带预测性洞察和内置合规规则。

自实施以来，Coles已实现：
通过自动数据建模将规划时间从数小时缩短至数分钟。
在牛肉、羊肉和猪肉品类中一致地应用业务政策。
通过将机构知识嵌入系统来降低运营风险。
提高客户响应能力以满足不断变化的需求。
提高规划准确性，以更好地支持肉类品类的鲜度和定价管理。
加强规划能力，以支持更高效的生产和库存管理。

“肉类是食品零售中最复杂的供应链之一，”Ever.Ag首席执行官Scott Sexton表示。“通过大规模应用数据科学，Coles展示了当高级分析与实际运营相结合时可能实现的效果。”

“我们的首要任务是为客户提供最佳体验，”Coles超市运营执行总经理Martin Smithson表示。“这种方法有助于确保以合适的价格提供最新鲜的切块。”

展望未来，Coles和Ever.Ag计划从基于数量的优化转向基于价值的优化，将盈利能力、运营效率和客户成果等因素纳入相同的规划模型。下一阶段将使Coles能够模拟场景、预测市场波动，并做出平衡效率与环境影响的决策。

Ever.Ag提供创新的农业科技解决方案和服务，涵盖市场情报、风险管理和尖端软件，使乳制品、畜牧业、作物和农业综合企业领域的运营更智能、更可持续。
contentHtml: Collaboration introduces advanced data science to optimize planning across fresh beef, pork and lamb categories.
